---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="row">

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://youwei-hu.shinyapps.io/dashboard_app/" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">EEG Biomarker Dashboard</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>An interactive Shiny dashboard comparing resting-state EEG biomarkers 
between Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) and Alzheimer's Disease (AD) 
patients. Built using R Shiny and flexdashboard with data from the 
Goizueta Brain Health Institute at Emory University.</p>
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/data555_Dashboard" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">
GitHub Repo
</a>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="col-sm-6">
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/shedding-hub" class="project-link">
<div class="panel panel-default">
<div class="panel-heading">
<h3 class="panel-title">Viral Shedding Data Integration & Modeling</h3>
</div>
<div class="panel-body">
<p>This project focuses on building a standardized dataset of viral shedding dynamics from published studies and integrating heterogeneous data sources such as viral load and Ct values. Using data extraction, cleaning, and Bayesian hierarchical modeling, the work aims to better understand infection trajectories and improve interpretation of incomplete or censored measurements. The results demonstrate how combining multiple data types can reveal more accurate and informative patterns of viral shedding over time.</p>
<a href="https://github.com/hww228/shedding-hub">
GitHub Repo
</a>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

</div>
